title: US stocks are off to their worst start versus the global market since 1995
author: Sigma Capital
metaDescription: US stocks had their worst start in 2026 compared to global markets since 1995. This trend is according to Goldman Sachs data.
excerpt: US stocks had their worst start in 2026 compared to global markets since 1995. This trend is according to Goldman Sachs data.

body: As a result, US stocks are off to their worst start of the year since 1995 against the global market, according to data from Goldman Sachs.
